images.why: Single swan on pastel pre-dawn lake. Smooth pink/violet sky, smooth water middle band. Painterly.
Misty lake with bare trees, soft reflection in calm water. Gentle and atmospheric.
Misty valley filled with fir trees in layered fog. Moody, gray-green, atmospheric.
Foggy bare pine forest in monochrome gray. Calm, painterly, no bright spots.

dawn/packed.note: Dropped to single image (bLgjbyf4wzw — the kept one). Couldn't find a clean second pick without bright-white left edge breaking nav. Confirm or push back.

images.why: Atmospheric pre-dawn fog through pine silhouettes. Enveloping, calming.
Vast open prairie under clean gradient teal sky. Maximum breathing room.
Layered mountain silhouettes with deep dark-blue ridge anchoring the left, opening to luminous peach sky right. Dark-left protects nav text.
Silky fog waves cascading over redwood forest at sunrise. Warm orange sky, blue-grey fog mid-band, dark conifer silhouettes anchor the left.
Lenticular streaked clouds over fog-wrapped hilltop with single tree silhouette. Painterly, layered, dark conifer treeline on left.
Misty forest path with dark arching trunks framing a vanishing point. Crisp, atmospheric, enveloping.
Misty tropical forest with double-canopy layering. Atmospheric, intimate, calm.
Warm terracotta desert fading to luminous salt flat under clean pale-blue sky.
Open landscape with sandy-rose tones. Minimal and unhurried.
Golden meadow with pale-blue top third. Cohesive warm-amber middle wash.
Balanced rolling landscape with warm afternoon clarity.
Tall old-growth trunks rising into misty green canopy. Grounded, enveloping understory.
Dense fern-and-moss forest floor with warm afternoon light. Intimate, rooted.
Warm amber-peach sky over glassy open horizon, minimal grass silhouettes.
Open golden-hour horizon with airy warm light.
Painterly warm mauve and rose layered alpine ridges with pale-gold (not white) sky.
Deep amber-orange glow saturates the frame, layered mountain silhouettes, classic golden-hour warmth.
Misty layered forest at golden hour with warm amber glow in smooth mid-band.
Autumn forest path with golden-amber haze and fallen leaves. Intimate, painterly.
Above-clouds twilight, smooth pale blush-to-pink sky, periwinkle blue middle band.
Calm pastel evening lake with single distant subject. Airy and unhurried.
Post-sunset blue hour over Norwegian fjord — cool teal water, layered snow-capped ridges.
Cool blue twilight landscape with layered atmosphere. Calm post-sunset mood.
Deeply tonal blue-teal post-sunset seascape, single clean horizon.
Coastal evening with twilight mood. Cool, calm, intimate.
Crescent moon over deep teal mountain silhouette. Smooth dark sky, single calm focal point.
Milky Way as one coherent vertical band over the Matterhorn with mirror reflection.
Deep blue twilight with layered dark mountains, glowing alpenglow peaks.
Deep teal starry night over snow-capped alpine peaks. Dark navy mid-band — briefing prose reads cleanly.
Deep navy starfield top third with monochromatic blue-black middle band.
Intimate night scene with deep cool tones. Enveloping, calm.
